Uses of Interface
io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext

  • Uses of FormContext in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi

    Classes in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi that implement FormContext
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    DefaultFormContext
    Default implementation of FormContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor after all fields of a @FormSpec type have been processed.
    Methods in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi with parameters of type FormContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<String>
    FormContributor.additionalCrossConstraints(FormContext context)
    Returns additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings to append to the crossConstraints array of the FormSpec.
    List<String>
    FormContributor.additionalFields(FormContext context)
    Returns additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings to append to the fields array of the FormSpec, in the returned list order.
    default Map<String,String>
    FormContributor.bundleEntries(FormContext context)
    Returns the i18n bundle entries (key → default text) for all i18nKey references emitted by FormContributor.additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and FormContributor.additionalCrossConstraints(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).
    List<String>
    SpiDispatcher.collectAdditionalCrossConstraints(FormContext ctx)
    Collects additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings from all active FormContributors.
    List<String>
    SpiDispatcher.collectAdditionalFields(FormContext ctx)
    Collects additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings from all active FormContributors.
    Map<String,String>
    SpiDispatcher.collectBundleEntries(FormContext ctx)
    Collects all i18n bundle entries (key → default text) from all active FormContributors.
    boolean
    FormContributor.supports(FormContext context)
    Returns true if this contributor should activate for the given form.
